task_description: Extract structured data from a scientific research paper PDF, including abstract, methodology sections, results tables, and references metadata.

input_data.context: The PDF is a machine learning research paper published in a top-tier conference. It contains an abstract, introduction, related work, methodology, experiments section with results tables comparing model performance, ablation study tables, and a references section. The paper uses two-column ACM/IEEE formatting with equations, figures, and dense footnotes.
